title: Sh4b0 Vanilla
description: A carefully crafted Vanilla+ modpack that enhances Minecraft with improved performance, smoother animations, revamped UI, and new structures—keeping the game fresh without losing its classic charm!
body:
# CNRS Vanilla - A New Minecraft Experience!
![The word CEPTEN RAFS behind the skin of cepten rafs sitting and a red background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a93103a747bd51d9c4f9f4544d28fcfbf46493d4.png)
## ⛏️ Keep the Vanilla Feel, Supercharge the Gameplay!

Tired of boring vanilla but don’t want to lose that classic Minecraft charm? This modpack is built to enhance your experience while staying true to the game you love! Featuring smoother performance, better UI, immersive animations, and tons of quality-of-life improvements, this is the ultimate way to upgrade Minecraft without overloading it with unnecessary changes.

## ✨ Key Features:

### ✅ Massive FPS Boost –
Performance mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore make your game run buttery smooth.

### ✅ Enhanced UI & HUD –
A clean, updated interface with better menus and more useful overlays.

### ✅ Better Mobs & Animations –
More dynamic and realistic mob animations make the world feel alive!

### ✅ New Structures & Dungeons –
Discover Minecraft Dungeons-style structures with epic loot!

### ✅ QoL Features –
NoChatReports, Visual Workbench, and other tweaks to make life easier.

### 💡 Runs on Fabric –
Easy to install, lightweight, and optimized for all PCs!

### ⚡ Download now and transform your Minecraft world without losing its original charm!
